title: Design Disjoint Set (Union-Find)
description: Design a Union-Find / Disjoint Set Union (DSU) with find(x) and union(x,y). Use path compression and union by rank for near-O(1) amortized operations.
key_concept: find: follow parent pointers to root (with path compression — point directly to root). union: attach smaller rank tree under larger rank root.

hints.L1: parent[i] = i initially (each node is its own root). find(x): if parent[x]==x, it's the root. Otherwise, recurse and update parent[x] directly to root (path compression).
hints.L2: union(x, y): find roots. If same root, already connected. Attach smaller rank under larger. If equal rank, increment one.
hints.L3: find(x): if parent[x]!=x: parent[x]=find(parent[x]); return parent[x] ← this one-liner does path compression
